violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The stock room remains overstocked, with pallets and u-boats up against the walls, and little to no space between them. Inspector unable to inspect for pest activity in the stock room. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the stock room still lack coving. Gap observed between the walls and floor. Crumbling cement pieces observed in this space. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The stock room remains overstocked, with pallets and u-boats up against the walls, and little to no space between them. Inspector unable to inspect for pest activity in the stock room. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The floor and wall junctures of the stock room still do not have coving. There is a gap at the bottom between the floor and walls. Crumbling cement pieces observed in the space. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
